caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, a black t-shirt that says "CHECK IT!", and headphones sits in a studio setting for a podcast recording. He wears a gold chain with a pendant and is positioned behind a professional microphone. In the background, white banners featuring gold stars and the word "HUSTLE" are visible, along with a large logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics appear in the lower corners, including a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and maintains a steady gaze toward someone off-camera to his right. There is very little movement between the frames, as he maintains a consistent posture and facial expression while speaking or listening during the recording session.
